case_title: BODE CONCRETE LLC VS. 766 HARRISON, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC SERVED NOV-05-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 73 SUMNER, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 766 HARRISON, LLC 60 RAUSCH, LLC 73 SUMNER, LLC $27,372.59 PRINCIPAL, $3,285.00 INTEREST, $513.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $31,170.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT PARK VIEW CONSTRUCTION WALSH, TERRY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-20-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
